{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Redmoon Herald
| aliases = Herald Redmoon
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Redmoon Herald]] was once the [[Blood Shadow]] of the [[Sage of Red Faith]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Herald]] [[Redmoon]] fought the [[Sage of Red Faith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
